services.label: Services
services.headline: Everything your brand needs

gestion-redes.name: Social Media Management
gestion-redes.tagline: Active presence, real community, measurable results
gestion-redes.description: We handle everything: strategy, content creation, daily publishing and monthly analysis. You focus on your business, we focus on growing your brand and turning your community into customers.
deliverables: Publishing and scheduling across all your networks
Social Ads campaigns optimized for conversion
Detailed monthly report with metrics and next steps

branding.name: Brand Boost
branding.tagline: An identity that inspires trust and attracts your ideal customer
branding.description: We build or refresh your brand identity so every customer touchpoint conveys professionalism, consistency and values. Because before they hire you, people already judge by your image.
deliverables: Complete visual identity — logo, colors and typography
Brand guidelines with clear usage rules
Pack of 20+ editable templates for social media
Brand naming and copywriting aligned to your audience
Communication strategy and brand voice definition

paginas-web.name: Web Design
paginas-web.tagline: Websites that load fast, look perfect and convert visits into customers
paginas-web.description: We design and develop your website from scratch focused on three things: speed, stunning appearance on any device, and converting visits into real customers.
deliverables: Development in Next.js or WordPress as needed
Technical on-page SEO implemented from day one
Integration with your CRM, forms and analytics
Core Web Vitals optimization — maximum speed

process.label: Process
process.headline: From zero to results in 60 days
process.subheadline: A structured process, no improvisation, where every week counts.

steps.title: Free diagnosis
steps.description: We analyze your current digital presence, your competition and your target audience. No commitment. With real data.

steps.title: Custom strategy
steps.description: We design a personalized action plan with clear goals, measurable KPIs and a roadmap for the first 90 days.

steps.title: Execution & content
steps.description: Our team creates and publishes content. We manage campaigns. You focus on your business.

steps.title: Continuous optimization
steps.description: We review metrics every week, adjust what doesn't work and scale what does. Measurable results in 60 days.

items.name: Laura Martínez
items.text: In 3 months we doubled online bookings from Instagram. Geko doesn't just manage social media — they understand the business and create content that converts. The team is incredibly fast and professional.

items.name: Carlos Ruiz
items.text: We had gone years without a real digital presence. In 60 days we had a solid strategy, daily content and our first Meta campaigns with a ROAS of ×3.8. We can't imagine the business without Geko now.

items.name: Sofía Delgado
items.text: What surprised me most was the speed. The first month we already noticed the change in enquiries. Now we have a waiting list for September — something we had never achieved with other agencies.

items.name: Marcos Jiménez
items.text: With Geko we went from 400 to 8,200 Instagram followers in 4 months. Bookings through social media increased by 340%. Their content strategy is different — every post has a purpose.

items.name: Ana Vega
items.role: Marketing Director · Solaris Real Estate Group
items.text: We manage three brands with Geko simultaneously and the level of organisation is impressive. Clear weekly reports, response in under 2 hours always, and results we present confidently to management.

items.q: How long does it take to see results?
items.a: The first measurable results usually appear between weeks 4-8. Engagement metrics improve quickly, while the impact on sales consolidates in 60-90 days. We're transparent: if something doesn't work, we adjust it.

items.q: Do you work with all types of businesses?
items.a: We work with SMEs, freelancers and growing brands in any sector. We specialise in local businesses, e-commerce, professional services and hospitality. If you're unsure whether we're the right fit, tell us in the free consultation.

items.q: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
items.a: No. All our plans are monthly with no lock-in. You can cancel whenever you want with 15 days' notice. We rely on results to retain you, not the fine print.

items.q: What does the free consultation include?
items.a: A 30-45 minute video call where we analyse your current situation, your goals and present a preliminary roadmap. No pressure, no aggressive sales. If we're not the right partner for you, we'll tell you.

Our in-house team of copywriters and designers creates all content adapted to your brand voice. You review and approve before publishing. Over time the process becomes smoother and requires less of your time.

items.q: Can I change my plan later?
items.a: Of course. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Many clients start with Silver and scale to Gold when they see results. The change applies in the next billing cycle.

ctaFinal.headline: Ready to see real results?
ctaFinal.subheadline: Book a free 30-minute consultation and we'll tell you exactly what we'd do with your brand.
ctaFinal.disclaimer: No lock-in · Cancel anytime · Results in 60 days
